segments.text: Page 46, Conversation. Listen and read, then say
Hooray, we made it to the carnival.
Yes, and we're lucky because it's the last day.
I think it's great that all the attractions are half price.
I'd like to take advantage of the discount and try to go on all the rides.
I could ride the white horse on the merry-go-round.
I'll try the flying cars, but that new ride might not be what I like.
I'll try out a bunch of the rides, but I'd also like to play some games. Should we all try to win a prize?
We must try the basketball game. I can sometimes shoot three baskets in a row.
Here it is. Shall we? You first, Stella.
Okay, I'll give it a try. It looks easy when the man in the booth shoots it.
Yeah, they can always make it look easy. While you're doing that, we're going to try out the bowling game.
We'll see if any of us is an expert at the games.
We got an action figure for a prize. I'll be really generous and give it to you, Helen.
No, thanks. I don't like action figures.
Ugh, I got a doll with a pink dress for my prize. Who would want something like that?
We'll take it. Pink is my favorite color.
Good idea. We'll trade prizes. There's no way I'll carry a pink doll around the carnival.
